Package index

Package

Package-level documentation and overview.

LDxBlocks-package LDxBlocks
LDxBlocks: Genome-Wide LD Block Detection and Haplotype Analysis

Main pipeline

High-level functions for genome-wide LD block detection. run_Big_LD_all_chr() is the recommended entry point.

run_Big_LD_all_chr()
Genome-Wide LD Block Detection by Chromosome
Big_LD()
LD Block Segmentation (r^2 or rV^2, C++ accelerated)
CLQD()
Clique-Based LD Block Detection
tune_LD_params()
Auto-Tune LD Block Detection Parameters
run_ldx_pipeline()
End-to-End Haplotype Block Pipeline

Genotype I/O

Read genotype data from six formats (numeric dosage CSV, HapMap, VCF, GDS, PLINK BED, R matrix) through a unified backend interface.

read_geno()
Read Genotype Data into an LDxBlocks Backend
read_chunk()
Extract a Genotype Slice from an LDxBlocks Backend
close_backend()
Close an LDxBlocks Backend and Release File Handles
print(<LDxBlocks_backend>)
Print Method for LDxBlocks Backend
summary(<LDxBlocks_backend>)
Summary Method for LDxBlocks Backend

LD computation

LD matrix computation: standard r² and kinship-adjusted rV².

compute_ld()
Compute LD Matrix: Standard r^2 or Kinship-Adjusted rV^2
compute_r2()
Compute Standard r^2 LD Matrix
compute_rV2()
Compute Kinship-Adjusted rV^2 LD Matrix
prepare_geno()
Prepare Genotype Matrix for LD Computation
get_V_inv_sqrt()
Compute the Inverse Square Root (Whitening Factor) of a Kinship Matrix

Phasing

Functions for obtaining gametic phase from WGS data (Beagle), pedigree records, or pre-phased VCF files.

read_phased_vcf()
Read Pre-Phased VCF
phase_with_beagle()
Statistical Phasing via Beagle 5.x
phase_with_pedigree()
Pedigree-Based Allele Transmission Phasing
unphase_to_dosage()
Collapse Phased Gametes to 0/1/2 Dosage

Haplotype analysis

Extract haplotypes within LD blocks (phased or unphased), compute diversity metrics, map GWAS hits to QTL regions, and build feature matrices for genomic prediction.

extract_haplotypes()
Extract Haplotype Strings Within LD Blocks
compute_haplotype_diversity()
Compute Haplotype Diversity Per Block
define_qtl_regions()
Map GWAS Hits to LD Blocks (Post-GWAS QTL Region Definition)
build_haplotype_feature_matrix()
Build Haplotype Dosage Matrix for Genomic Prediction

Haplotype output writers

Write haplotype matrices and diversity tables to disk in formats compatible with TASSEL, GAPIT, rrBLUP, BGLR, and ASReml-R.

write_haplotype_numeric()
Write Haplotype Matrix as Numeric CSV
write_haplotype_hapmap()
Write Haplotype Matrix in HapMap Format
write_haplotype_diversity()
Write Haplotype Diversity Table

Utilities

Summary statistics and visualisation for block tables.

summarise_blocks()
Summarise LD Block Characteristics
plot_ld_blocks()
Plot LD Block Structure Across Chromosomes

Example data

Simulated datasets (120 individuals, 230 SNPs, 3 chromosomes, 9 LD blocks) for examples and tests.

ldx_geno
Example Genotype Matrix
ldx_snp_info
Example SNP Information Table
ldx_blocks
Example LD Block Table
ldx_gwas
Example GWAS Marker Table

On this page

Developed by Félicien Akohoue.
